description_long: This object depicts an elderly man with short white hair, dressed in a formal purple suit with a white shirt and scarf. The suit features a distinctive pattern with white and black patches, and the man is wearing black dress shoes. His facial expression is stern and his face is marked by visible wrinkles, suggesting age. The figure's posture is upright, with both arms extended outward, one arm bent at the elbow and the other straight. The clothing appears tailored and formal, with a prominent lapel and button details on the jacket. The overall appearance is that of a dignified elderly gentleman, possibly intended to represent a notable or ceremonial figure in an urban environment.
description: An elderly man with short white hair, wearing a formal purple patterned suit, white shirt, and black shoes, stands upright with arms extended.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's stern face, white hair, and the full detail of his purple suit with white and black patches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his face, the length of his outstretched arm, and the side seam of his suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of his head, the suit's back pattern, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the other profile, the right arm's extension, and the suit's side details.
attribute_clothing_style: Formal purple suit with white and black patches, white dress shirt, white scarf, and black dress shoes.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: short white hair, straight, neatly combed
attribute_facial_features: stern expression, visible wrinkles, no facial hair, no glasses
